insight_tenant_id.title: Insight Tenant ID
insight_tenant_id.description: Tenant isolation identifier for the ingestion layer.

salesforce_instance_url.title: Instance URL
salesforce_instance_url.description: Salesforce instance URL (e.g. 'https://mycompany.my.salesforce.com'). OAuth token endpoint is derived from this URL.

salesforce_client_id.title: Client ID
salesforce_client_id.description: OAuth Consumer Key from the Salesforce External Client App (Client Credentials flow).

salesforce_client_secret.title: Client Secret
salesforce_client_secret.description: OAuth Consumer Secret from the Salesforce External Client App.

salesforce_start_date.title: Start Date
salesforce_start_date.description: UTC start for initial incremental sync. Accepts YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ. Records older than this are skipped on first run. Omit to fall back to 2 years before now.

salesforce_streams.title: Streams Override
salesforce_streams.description: Optional list of SF sobject names to sync. If set, overrides the curated default (Account, Contact, Opportunity, etc.). Use for per-tenant customization (add Lead types, custom objects).

salesforce_stream_slice_step.title: Stream Slice Step
salesforce_stream_slice_step.description: ISO-8601 duration for concurrent cursor slice width. Smaller = more parallelism, more API calls. Default P30D (30 days).

salesforce_lookback_window.title: Lookback Window
salesforce_lookback_window.description: ISO-8601 duration to re-read before the cursor position each sync (accounts for Salesforce SystemModstamp eventual consistency). Default PT10M.

salesforce_force_use_bulk_api.title: Force Bulk API
salesforce_force_use_bulk_api.description: Force Bulk API 2.0 even for sobjects with compound/base64 fields (those fields will be dropped from CSV output). Default false: Bulk used when safe, REST fallback otherwise.

salesforce_num_workers.title: Concurrent Workers
salesforce_num_workers.description: Max concurrent Bulk jobs + REST slice fetches. Clamped to [1, 50]. Default 20.
